title: Transitional provisions
doc_html:
§703.  Transitional provisions

Any and all rules and regulations of the board adopted prior to August 15, 1999, shall be and shall remain effective without readoption or further promulgation by the board.

Acts 1980, No. 568, §1; Acts 1999, No. 396, §1.
doc_text:
§703.  Transitional provisions
Any and all rules and regulations of the board adopted prior to August 15, 1999, shall be and shall remain effective without readoption or further promulgation by the board.
Acts 1980, No. 568, §1; Acts 1999, No. 396, §1.
